name: token27/nexus-ai-content
description: Generic content orchestration layer for NexusAI workflows, prompts, tracking, pricing, and domain extensions.

suggest.token27/nexus-ai-tokenizer: Optional tokenizer support for pre-request token estimation through a configured nexus-ai-pricing engine.
suggest.token27/nexus-ai-images: Use from content domain extensions when a workflow needs generated images.
suggest.token27/nexus-ai-content-formatters: Use at the publication/export boundary to format generated structured content.
